summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Tie-Down Calculator export and save-to-inspection features. All backend APIs (12/12 tests passed) and frontend features working correctly. Calculator button in header is gold-filled and navigates to /calculator. Floating action bar appears when cargo data and tie-downs exist. Export Report downloads HTML file with correct tie-down data. Save to Inspection modal lists all inspections and successfully saves tie-down assessments. InspectionDetail page displays tie-down assessments with compliance status, cargo info, and tie-down list. Delete functionality works. Inspection export includes tie-down assessment HTML section.
passed_tests: Calculator button in header is visible with gold background (#D4AF37)
Calculator button navigates to /calculator
Floating action bar hidden when no cargo data or tie-downs
Floating action bar appears when cargo weight and tie-downs exist
Export Report button downloads HTML file (tiedown-assessment-YYYY-MM-DD.html)
Standalone HTML export contains correct tie-down data (cargo weight, length, WLL, compliance status)
Save to Inspection button opens modal
Save modal lists all existing inspections
Selecting inspection in modal saves tie-down assessment via POST /api/inspections/{id}/tiedown
Success toast shown after saving tie-down assessment
Backend POST /api/inspections/{id}/tiedown correctly computes effective WLL (direct=100%, indirect=50%, defective=0)
Backend stores tiedown_assessments array on inspection document
InspectionDetail page displays tie-down assessments section
Tie-down assessment shows compliance status badge (COMPLIANT/NOT COMPLIANT)
Tie-down assessment shows cargo weight, length, effective WLL, WLL percentage
Tie-down assessment shows tie-down list with method badges (DIRECT/INDIRECT) and defective status
Remove button on tie-down assessment works (DELETE /api/inspections/{id}/tiedown/{assessment_id})
Success toast shown after removing tie-down assessment
Inspection HTML export (GET /api/inspections/{id}/export) includes tie-down assessment section
Math verification: 30000 lbs cargo, 20ft, direct 3300 + indirect 6600 + defective 11300 = eff 6600 = 44% NOT COMPLIANT
Math verification: 30000 lbs cargo, 20ft, all direct 3300+6600+11300 = 21200 = 141% COMPLIANT
seed_data_creation: Test inspections created during pytest runs are cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tie-Down Calculator export and save-to-inspection features fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/inspections/{id}/tiedown (save), DELETE /api/inspections/{id}/tiedown/{assessment_id} (remove), GET /api/inspections/{id}/export (includes tie-down HTML). Frontend components: TieDownCalculator.js (export-standalone-btn, save-to-inspection-btn, save-modal), InspectionDetail.js (tiedown-assessments-section, remove-tiedown-{id}). Math formulas verified: Required WLL = 50% cargo weight, Direct = 100% WLL, Indirect = 50% WLL, Defective = 0 lbs.
